case_title: ZHI GUO ZHAO VS. JESSICA FASSAS

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ZHAO, ZHI GUO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHAO, ZHI GUO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FASSAS, JESSICA $3,455.12 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,520.12 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ZHAO, ZHI GUO AS TO DEFENDANT FASSAS, JESSICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-01-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FASSAS, JESSICA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHAO, ZHI GUO AS TO DEFENDANT FASSAS, JESSICA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-20-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-20-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ZHI GUO ZHAO IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY VIVIENNE CHOY WITH MANDARIN INTERPRETATION. MS. CHOY WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETERS OATH. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT FASSAS, JESSICA
